title: Non-string title/author yields 500 instead of 400
evidence: app.py:57 `not title or not title.strip()` and app.py:121/127 `data['title'].strip()` call .strip() on the raw value; a numeric JSON title (e.g. {"title": 123, "author": "x"}) is truthy so .strip() raises AttributeError -> 500
suggestion: Coerce/verify title and author are strings before .strip(); return 400 on non-string input

title: No requirements.txt / pyproject.toml
evidence: run dir has no requirements.txt or pyproject.toml; dependencies (flask, flask-sqlalchemy) documented only as a `pip install` line in README.md:22
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning flask and flask-sqlalchemy for reproducible setup

title: Year type validation beyond spec
evidence: app.py:67-71 coerces year to int and returns 400 on failure; not required by TASK.md but a reasonable hardening
suggestion: None — noted as enhancement over spec
